issues.description: Missing condition: LeaderIsName 'Usopp' — effect only triggers if Leader is Usopp
Missing optional cost: Rest your Leader or 1 Stage card — this is a required decision point before effect resolves
RevealFromHand is incorrect — should SearchDeck to look at top 5 cards, then RevealFromHand to reveal up to 2 Dressrosa cards (excluding Leo)
Filter should target Dressrosa type cards excluding Leo, not generic Character
Reveal count should be 'up to 2', not 1
SearchDeck action is in wrong sequence — should come before RevealFromHand; also missing 'count' and proper filter for Dressrosa exclusion
Missing step: place remaining cards at bottom of deck in any order — requires ReorderDeck or equivalent

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] You may rest your Leader or 1 of your Stage cards: If your Leader is [Usopp], look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 2 {Dressrosa} type cards other than [Leo] and add them to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order, and trash 1 card from your hand.

cost.description: Rest your Leader or 1 Stage card

actions.description: Place remaining cards at bottom of deck in any order
